What is there to say?  In array context, as provided by `my @fileData`, the `<>` operator reads lines into the array with an implicit loop.  It works.  Occasionally, it is useful. Perl has a couple of mottos.  One is TMTOWTDI — There's More Than One Way To Do It.  Another is DWIM — Do What I Mean; at least, Perl does this more than many languages, provided you know what you're asking for.  This is a piece of dwimmery.
